'''sovashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biacetabular|biacetabular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biacetabular|biacetabular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sovashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovashithi|sovashithi]] || [[word:sovashiji|sovashiji]] || [[word:sovashishi|sovashishi]] || [[word:sovashiki|sovashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovashuthuthu|sovashuthuthu]] || [[word:sovashujuju|sovashujuju]] || [[word:sovashushushu|sovashushushu]] || [[word:sovashukuku|sovashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovashuthu|sovashuthu]] || [[word:sovashuju|sovashuju]] || [[word:sovashushu|sovashushu]] || [[word:sovashuku|sovashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovashufthuf|sovashufthuf]] || [[word:sovashufjuf|sovashufjuf]] || [[word:sovashufshuf|sovashufshuf]] || [[word:sovashufkuf|sovashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovashethe|sovashethe]] || [[word:sovasheje|sovasheje]] || [[word:sovasheshe|sovasheshe]] || [[word:sovasheke|sovasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovashothotho|sovashothotho]] || [[word:sovashojojo|sovashojojo]] || [[word:sovashoshosho|sovashoshosho]] || [[word:sovashokoko|sovashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovashotho|sovashotho]] || [[word:sovashojo|sovashojo]] || [[word:sovashosho|sovashosho]] || [[word:sovashoko|sovashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovashofthof|sovashofthof]] || [[word:sovashofjof|sovashofjof]] || [[word:sovashofshof|sovashofshof]] || [[word:sovashofkof|sovashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovashïfthïf|sovashïfthïf]] || [[word:sovashïfjïf|sovashïfjïf]] || [[word:sovashïfshïf|sovashïfshïf]] || [[word:sovashïfkïf|sovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovashïfthïfthïf|sovashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:sovashïfjïfjïf|sovashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:sovashïfshïfshïf|sovashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:sovashïfkïfkïf|sovashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovashïfthïf|sovashïfthïf]] || [[word:sovashïfjïf|sovashïfjïf]] || [[word:sovashïfshïf|sovashïfshïf]] || [[word:sovashïfkïf|sovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovashïfthïf|sovashïfthïf]] || [[word:sovashïfjïf|sovashïfjïf]] || [[word:sovashïfshïf|sovashïfshïf]] || [[word:sovashïfkïf|sovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sovashæthæ|sovashæthæ]] || [[word:sovashæjæ|sovashæjæ]] || [[word:sovashæshæ|sovashæshæ]] || [[word:sovashækæ|sovashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sovashathatha|sovashathatha]] || [[word:sovashajaja|sovashajaja]] || [[word:sovashashasha|sovashashasha]] || [[word:sovashakaka|sovashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sovashatha|sovashatha]] || [[word:sovashaja|sovashaja]] || [[word:sovashasha|sovashasha]] || [[word:sovashaka|sovashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sovashafthaf|sovashafthaf]] || [[word:sovashafjaf|sovashafjaf]] || [[word:sovashafshaf|sovashafshaf]] || [[word:sovashafkaf|sovashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sovashasha|sovashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sovashësha|sovashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sovashrosha|sovashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sovashmusha|sovashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sovashyasha|sovashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosovashnkshësha|gosovashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosovashnkrosha|gosovashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosovashnkmusha|gosovashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosovashnkyasha|gosovashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sovavashasha|sovavashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sovavashësha|sovavashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sovavashrosha|sovavashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sovavashmusha|sovavashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sovavashyasha|sovavashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosovavashnkshësha|gosovavashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosovavashnkrosha|gosovavashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosovavashnkmusha|gosovavashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosovavashnkyasha|gosovavashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:sevæshasha|sevæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sevæshësha|sevæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sevæshrosha|sevæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sevæshmusha|sevæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sevæshyasha|sevæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosevæshnkshësha|gosevæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosevæshnkrosha|gosevæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosevæshnkmusha|gosevæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosevæshnkyasha|gosevæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sovfashasha|sovfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sovfashësha|sovfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sovfashrosha|sovfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sovfashmusha|sovfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sovfashyasha|sovfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosovfashnkshësha|gosovfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosovfashnkrosha|gosovfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosovfashnkmusha|gosovfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosovfashnkyasha|gosovfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
